title: El enamorado
writer: Miguel Zacarías, Álvaro Gálvez y Fuentes, Paulino Masip
actors: Pedro Infante, Sara Montiel, Eulalio González
plot: Martin who has retired from his hero lifestyle because of his marriage with Rosary, returns to his heroic duties to help a friend from some assailants. Although Martin had promised his wife that he was done fighting crime, she giv...
